parameters.jsCode:
const email = $input.item.json.email_address;
// Syntax check
const syntaxOk = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$/.test(email);
const domain = syntaxOk ? email.split('@')[1].toLowerCase() : null;

// Disposable domain list (100+ providers)
const DISPOSABLE = new Set([
  'guerrillamail.com','guerrillamailblock.com','spam4.me','grr.la',
  'tempmail.com','temp-mail.org','throwam.com','throwam.net','throwam.io',
  'mailinator.com','mailinator2.com','trashmail.com','trashmail.net','trashmail.at',
  'yopmail.com','yopmail.fr','cool.fr.nf','jetable.fr.nf','nospam.ze.tc',
  '10minutemail.com','10minutemail.net','10minutemail.org','10minutemail.co.uk',
  'guerrillamail.info','guerrillamail.biz','guerrillamail.de','guerrillamail.net',
  'sharklasers.com','guerrillamail.org',
  'dispostable.com','mailnull.com','spamgourmet.com','spamgourmet.net',
  'maildrop.cc','discard.email','throwaway.email','33mail.com',
  'spambox.us','mytrashmail.com','mt2015.com','mt2009.com','chacuo.net',
  'fakeinbox.com','fakeinbox.net','filzmail.com',
  'getnada.com','getnada.io','mailnesia.com',
  'mailscrap.com','mailsiphon.com','mailtothis.com','mintemail.com',
  'moza.pl','mt2014.com','nwldx.com','objectmail.com',
  'obobbo.com','oneoffmail.com','pookmail.com','proxymail.eu',
  'rcpt.at','rklips.com','rmqkr.net','safetymail.info','safetypost.de',
  'sendspamhere.com','shieldedmail.com','spamavert.com','spamfree24.org',
  'spamhole.com','spamify.com','spaml.de','spammotel.com','spamobox.com',
  'spamspot.com','spamthis.co.uk','spamtroll.net','supergreatmail.com',
  'suremail.info','sweetxxx.de','tafmail.com','tagyourself.com','teewars.org',
  'teleworm.us','tempalias.com','tempe-mail.com','tempemail.biz','tempinbox.co.uk',
  'tempinbox.com','tempmail.eu','tempomail.fr','temporaryemail.net',
  'thankyou2010.com','thisisnotmyrealemail.com','throam.com',
  'tilien.com','tmail.ws','tmailinator.com','trash2009.com','trash2010.com',
  'trashdevil.com','trashdevil.de','trashemail.de',
  'trashmail.io','trashmail.me','trashmailer.com','trashymail.com',
  'turboposta.com','twinmail.de','tyldd.com','uggsrock.com','uroid.com',
  'veryrealemail.com','viditag.com','viewcastmedia.com','viewcastmedia.net'
]);

const is_disposable = syntaxOk ? DISPOSABLE.has(domain) : false;
return { json: {
  email, domain,
  valid_syntax: syntaxOk,
  is_disposable,
  skip_smtp: !syntaxOk || is_disposable
}};

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $json.email, domain: $json.domain, is_valid: $json.is_valid, is_catch_all: $json.is_catch_all, is_disposable: $json.is_disposable, mx_records: $json.mx_records, smtp_result: $json.smtp_result, verified_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
